SEARCH
Package com.govsim.govsim.president

Class President

java.lang.Object
com.govsim.govsim.president.President
public class President extends Object
President — makes all major decisions using AI suggestions: 1. Dangerous event — picks from 3 AI DecisionOptions 2. Monthly report — applies ADD/CUT/KEEP per ministry 3. Annual review — keeps or fires ministers
